title: prunus × donarium var. pubescens
intro: Prunus × donarium var. pubescens is a variety of the Donars plum, a type of plum tree known for its unique characteristics and medicinal properties. The bark and leaves of this plant contain flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which are believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The medicinal properties of Prunus × donarium var. pubescens have been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, diarrhea, and respiratory problems, offering relief from congestion and coughs. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to support digestive health and boost the immune system.
